narrative:
Hamer (precinct in Highland County) has 474 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
